2026-06-22.message: 🚀 Today's theme: Launch Day! Wear something space-related — rockets, NASA gear, or a bright color visible from space.
🎺 Bring your instrument when we head to lunch!

2026-06-23.message: 🌌 Today's theme: Deep Space! Dark colors — black, navy, deep purple. Bonus for stars or glow-in-the-dark.
🎬 Movie Night after the recital — no food delivery, but there will be 🍿 snacks!

2026-06-24.message: 👽 Today's theme: First Contact! Wear an alien — E.T., Grogu, Stitch. No alien gear? Go green, silver, or metallic.
🎷 It's Melissa Aldana Day! Masterclass at 2:30 in Feasel Hall, concert at 7:15 in Tinsley Hall.
🎶 Melissa Aldana concert starts at 7:15 — head to Tinsley Hall!

2026-06-25.message: 🐱 Today's theme: Purrs-day Thursday! Wear something cat — ears, tail, shirt, socks. Space cats welcome.
🎶 Young Artist Honors Recital at 7:00 in Lee Chapel.

2026-06-26.message: 🌊 Today's theme: Splashdown! Beach vibes — surf shirts, tropical prints, flip flops. No bathing suits.
🎶 Chamber Music Concert tonight at 7:15 in Lee Chapel.
🧳 Time to start packing for move out tomorrow.

2026-06-27.message: 🎓 Today's theme: School Spirit Day! Wear your school colors or rep where you're from.
🎓 Saxophone Ensembles Concert at 11:30 in Lee Chapel!
↩️ Return all borrowed instruments, music, and equipment in Tinsley Hall.
👋 Thank you for a great week! See you next year!
